title: Sculptural Wool Coat
description: An architectural masterpiece in double-faced wool with clean, sculpted shoulders and an oversized silhouette that redefines modern outerwear.

title: Silk Draped Midi Dress
description: Fluid silk charmeuse falls in effortless drapes, creating a timeless midi silhouette with minimal seaming and a bias-cut hem.

title: Tailored Wide-Leg Trousers
description: High-waisted wide-leg trousers in crisp cotton twill with a relaxed drape and clean pressed pleat.

title: Cashmere Oversized Knit
description: Luxuriously soft oversized cashmere sweater with dropped shoulders and a ribbed hem that balances volume with refinement.

title: Intrecciato Leather Tote
description: The signature Intrecciato weave rendered in supple calfskin, a spacious tote with effortless structure.

title: Deconstructed Linen Blazer
description: Relaxed linen blazer with deconstructed details, asymmetric lapels, and a sun-bleached palette inspired by the South of France.

title: Puzzle Edge Small Bag
description: The iconic Puzzle reimagined with geometric edge panels in contrast leathers, a signature piece of architectural craftsmanship.

title: Signature Scarf Coat
description: Toteme's iconic scarf-collar coat in pressed wool, with a wrap-front closure and a minimalist Scandinavian silhouette.

title: Padded Leather Slides
description: Minimalist padded leather slides with a sculpted footbed, embodying Jil Sander's commitment to quiet luxury and impeccable craft.

title: Ami de Coeur Cardigan
description: Relaxed-fit merino wool cardigan featuring the embroidered Ami de Coeur logo, a staple of Parisian nonchalance.

title: Tabi Ankle Boots
description: The iconic split-toe silhouette in polished calfskin leather with a cylindrical heel, Margiela's most recognizable design.

title: Vegan Leather Gathered Top
description: Sustainably crafted from plant-based vegan leather with artful gathering details and a cropped, modern silhouette.

title: Borrowed Shirt in Silk
description: The oversized Borrowed Shirt cut from washed silk with a boxy fit and softly curved hem, effortlessly gender-fluid.

title: Dorothea Volume Trousers
description: Voluminous pleated trousers in Japanese wool suiting with an elasticated back waist for comfort without compromise.

title: Brushed Cashmere Scarf
description: Ultra-soft brushed cashmere scarf woven in Japan with a featherweight hand and raw-edge finish.
